comments.reviewComments: Overall, the hotel is nice and close to the Baitulrahman Grand Mosque. However, the cleanliness of the hotel needs to be improved.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotelnya tua, lumayan bersih, yang paling bagus adalah akses kemanapun dekat, cari makan juga mudah, parkir super luas

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: cleanliness of rooms need to improved
comments.reviewPositives: near to areas intended/wish to visit
comments.reviewTitle: Will stay again in this hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I saw for myself that Plum Lading Hotel has changed and grown more. The cleanliness and comfort of the rooms are very good (especially the air conditioning), and the water heater functions well too. The hotel environment is also well-organized and the parking lot is very spacious. I have a few suggestions for improving the service at Plum Lading, including: providing bottled drinking water in the rooms and a telephone facility connected to the reception desk to facilitate communication with the hotel staff. Additionally, ensure that the hotel Wi-Fi is reliable, including the operation of the TV to make it easier and simpler for hotel guests.

Wishing continued success for Plum Lading Hotel.
comments.originalComment:
Saya lihat sendiri bahwa Plum Lading Hotel sudah semakin berubah dan bertumbuh. Kebersihan dan kenyamanan kamar sangat baik (utamanya pendingin/ AC), demikian juga water hiternya berfungsi baik. Lingkungan hotelnya jg tertata dan halaman parkir sangat luas. Ada beberapa masukan dari Saya utk paripurnanya pelayanan Plum Lading diantaranya: dikamar hendaknya disediakan air minum kemasan dan fasilitas telp yg terhubung dengan meja resepsionis agar memudahkan komunikasi dengan kru hotel. Selain ini pastikan wife hotel lancar termasuk cara operasionalkan TV agar lbh mudah dan sederhana utk pengunjung hotel. 

Sukses selalu untuk Plum Lading Hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: dirty toilet, mosquito, less electric socket
comments.reviewPositives: location, big room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is very clean and comfortable, and the prices are very affordable. In terms of facilities, the only drawback is the lack of an elevator; everything else is excellent.
comments.reviewTitle: Hotel Worthy for a Budget Vacation
comments.originalTitle: Hotel Sangat Layak untuk  Liburan Murah
comments.originalComment: Hotel sangat bersih dan nyaman, serta harga sangat terjangkau. Kalau dari segi fasilitas, cman kekurangan di lift saja, sisanya sangat mantap

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is suitable for travelers like us. Its location close to the city, friendly staff, and affordable prices make this hotel really great.
comments.originalComment: Hotelnya proper untuk traveler seperti kami. Lokasi yg dekat ke kota, staf yg ramah, dan harga yg affordable bikin hotel ini ok banget

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is clean, organized, and smells good, towels are provided. The AC is cold. The bathroom is clean. Only mineral water is not provided. The TV is working. The wifi is very slow. But, God willing, this hotel is really great, and I want to return again.
comments.originalComment: Kamar'a bersih, Rapi, wangi, disediakan handuk.. AC nya dingin.. Kamar mandi bersih.. Cuma tdk disediakan air mineral.. TV nya hidup.. Wifi lelet bgt.. Tp insyaALLAH bagus banget hotel ini dan pengen balik lg..

comments.reviewPositives: Es correcto

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Pros
- clean and fragrant room
- smart TV
- location near mosque and Aceh market
- spacious and free parking
- breakfast is decent

Cons
- no elevator
- towels are not absorbent and the small towels are child-sized
- no coffee or tea available
comments.originalComment:
Plus
- kamar bersih wangi
- smart tv
- lokasi dekat mesjid dan pasar aceh
- parkir luas dan gratis
- sarapan lumayanlah 

Minus
- tidak ada lift
- handuk nya tidak meresap dan handuk kecil seperti punya anak anak ukurannya
- tidak ada kopi teh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: La gentillesse du personnel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The business trip to Aceh became enjoyable by staying at this Plum hotel. The hotel is comfortable, the location is close to everything, and the staff is friendly and very helpful. We were also given an early check-in. Next time, if there is an opportunity to go to Aceh, I want to stay here again. Oh, and there is a great coffee shop just 300m away, and a complete souvenir shop is also near the hotel.
comments.reviewTitle: A pleasant hotel in the city center.
comments.originalTitle: Hotel di tengah kota yang menyenangkan
comments.originalComment:
Kunjungan kerja ke Aceh menjadi menyenangkan dengan menginap di hotel Plum ini. Hotel nyaman, lokasi dekat kemana-mana, staff ramah dan sangat membantu. Kami diberikan early check-in juga. Next time jika ada kesempatan ke Aceh, mau menginap di sini lagi.
Oh ya, kedai kopi enak hanya 300m dan toko oleh2 lengkap juga ada di dekat hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Gute Lage, hilfsbereite Personal. Konnte sogar früher einchecken. Kein Frühstück o.a. während Ramadan möglich 

Sehr einfach alles. Fernseher nicht zu nutzen, weil keine guten Programme verfügbar waren. Mobiliar sehr veraltet.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
​I recently stayed at Plum Hotel Lading and I think the best way to describe it is that you get exactly what you pay for. The location is definitely its strongest point because it is so close to the famous Grand Mosque. Being able to walk there and explore the surrounding area so easily was a huge plus for me. Finding good local food nearby was also effortless since there are plenty of options just steps away from the hotel.
​When I checked into my room, it looked generally clean and organized. However, I did feel that the AC was not quite cold enough during my stay, so the room didn't feel as chilly as I usually prefer. The bathroom was okay but not perfect. I noticed some spots in the corners that looked like they had been overlooked by the cleaning staff. It wasn't a dealbreaker, but definitely something that could be improved for a better experience.
​The staff here are really the highlight of the service. They were very kind and welcoming, which made me feel comfortable throughout my stay. I also noticed that despite being in such a busy area, the hotel manages to provide a decent level of convenience for travelers who want to be right in the middle of the action.
​Overall, I am satisfied with my stay considering the budget price. It is a very practical choice if you want to stay in a strategic location near the city's landmarks and enjoy easy access to everything Banda Aceh has to offer. It served its purpose well for my trip.
comments.reviewTitle: ​My Experience at Plum Hotel Lading Banda Aceh

Karena kemarin sampai hotel jam 4 pagi dan harus melanjutkan perjalanan lagi jam 8 pagi, jadi sudah pada lelah mau jalan ke depan untuk minta handuk.

comments.reviewComments: The room spacious, they all have the basic facilities. Just the internet for room not so strong. But the rest, i enjoyed staying here. The receptionist  is so helpful and friendly. Thank you so much night and day staff for very good and helpful during my stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: So, my family and I were here for a short trip. We booked for triple standard room but the room actually has four beds. The room also has a wardrobe with dresser table attached beside it. There's also one small dining table with two chairs. The bathroom is pretty clean but doesn't smell so good as if the staff not put any bathroom fragrance (please at least put it next time). The tv is already digital tv. Sadly there's no fridge.
